title: Student Tour
writer: Ralph Spence, Philip Dunne, George Seaton
actors: Jimmy Durante, Charles Butterworth, Maxine Doyle
plot: A college rowing team's world tour is in jeopardy because a philosophy professor plans to flunk the entire crew. Ann, the instructor's niece, convinces him to tutor the team on the ocean liner. When the crew's coxswain develops la...
